productDisplayName: Nike Men Manu Core Black Sweatshirts
description: Composition Black hooded sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has ribbed mock neck, cuffs and hem, club badge at left chest, kangaroo pockets on the front and manchester united screen-print at centre back Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Ruthless. Entertaining. Brilliant. That's the way that Man U plays the game. Defend your honour and show off your pride for the team that's unlike any other in Manchester United football Club jacket. In a retro-inspired design that pays tribute to the world's battle of the elite in 1998, the N98 Track Jacket is amped up to represent the ruthless spirit of the Red Devils. With intimidating club symbols, this jacket delivers the insulation you need on or off the field.
